opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact, no booking tools detected, and no online booking on site or GMB.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers searching after hours cannot book, sending leads to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing after-hours HVAC service requests automatically.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no recurring revenue signals on a 2017-era site.
opportunities.observation: Clearwater loses seasonal tune-up revenue with no automated spring or fall outreach.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal HVAC maintenance reminders via AI-triggered email and SMS campaigns.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM Automation
opportunities.signal: No CRM tools detected and phone-only contact means every unbooked call leaves no record.
opportunities.observation: Missed or unbooked calls from Boise homeowners are permanently lost with zero follow-up.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording with automatic CRM capture and missed-call text-back responses.
